title: Late cake pickup near Rosehill and Camellia — Harris Park open till 10pm
summary:
Order placed. Cake ready. Problem is picking it up before a 6pm bakery closes when you work until 5:30 in Rosehill or Camellia.

Harris Park stays open until 10pm, daily. Same 48-hour minimum notice as always — that's what fresh baking actually takes — but the pickup window doesn't disappear the moment your shift ends.

100% eggless. Not some cakes, every cake. Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher, any design from a photo reference.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Wigram Street, less than 10 minutes from Rosehill or Camellia.
keywords: late cake pickup near Rosehill and Camellia
Harris Park bakery open until 10pm daily
picking up a cake after work before it closes
